headline: American Banker Names Jude Schramm to Most Innovative People in Finance List
summary: CINCINNATI, June 09, 2026--Fifth Third Bank (Nasdaq: FITB) is pleased to announce that Jude Schramm, chief information officer, has been named to American Banker’s inaugural list of the Most Innovative People in Finance. The list recognizes executives and industry leaders driving transformation across banking, payments, technology, customer experience, AI, and digital financial services.
